mentions.note: CEO Bob Jordan + Elliott Management activist driving transformation; new fee-based model working with strong forward guidance; EPS expected to quadruple in 2026.

CEO Bob Jordan turnaround complete with Elliott Management backing; new revenue initiatives (assigned seats, bag fees, leg-room) working; guidance implies EPS can more than quadruple this year; stock up 19% post-earnings.
Caller Billy asked about 'Hasty Drop Airlines' (likely Southwest or another carrier); Cramer says don't go into the lion's den; prefer Nvidia instead.
Down 25% in <2 months; earnings expected to triple despite war and oil; Elliott activist transformation working; trades <15x PE; potential M&A target if majors consolidate mid-size carriers.
